recommendations.title: Through My Window 3: Looking at You
recommendations.overview: After the events of the summer, Ares and Raquel they don't see a way forward in their relationship and decide to go separate ways. But when they meet again in the winter in Barcelona, the love and desire they feel for each other is undeniable. Will t
Two university students gain insight into life and love as they get to know each other during a road trip across Europe.

recommendations.title: More the Merrier
recommendations.overview: Multiple stories about the oscillating world of couple relationships and how difficult it can be to separate sex from love.

recommendations.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
recommendations.overview: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: 3 Idiotas
recommendations.overview: A group of friends embark on an adventure to find a classmate from university who disappeared without a trace on graduation day.

recommendations.title: The Pills - Sempre meglio che lavorare
recommendations.overview: Three life-long friends struggle with an early middle-age crisis as they start to try to get a job for the first time. An ironic quest to avoid becoming an adult and accept responsibilities.

recommendations.title: Touki Bouki
recommendations.overview: Mory, a cowherd, and Anta, a university student, try to make money in order to go to Paris and leave their boring past behind.

recommendations.title: Underworld: Endless War
recommendations.overview: Follows Selene across 3 separate periods in history as she hunts a group of Lycan brothers.

recommendations.title: Goodbye Mr. Loser
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged loser travels back in time to his high school years to put his life on the right track.
